settings.name: Thomas “Tom” Gardner
settings.bio: Thomas E. “Tom” Gardner, currently serving as the Executive Chairman at Biom Pharmaceutical, brings a wealth of experience in healthcare leadership and strategy. With a history of…
settings.full_bio:
Thomas E. “Tom” Gardner, currently serving as the Executive Chairman at Biom Pharmaceutical, brings a wealth of experience in healthcare leadership and strategy. With a history of senior executive roles, board memberships, and advisory positions in various healthcare companies, Tom has played a pivotal role in shaping healthcare ventures. He is the founder and senior advisor at Omeza Holdings, Inc., co-founder of KeyView Labs, and founding chairman of IntegriChain, among other notable roles. Tom is also known for his commitment to fostering youth leadership through initiatives like the LEAD Program and his involvement in BRIDGE Angel Investors.
Before his extensive work in healthcare leadership, Tom Gardner served as Group Vice President at Johnson & Johnson from 1974 to 1987, leading the marketing and R&D teams that propelled Tylenol to become the number 1 Health & Beauty Aids brand in the U.S. Previously, Tylenol had only been marketed as an ethical pharmaceutical product.

His early career included a role as a Brand Manager at Procter & Gamble from 1970 to 1974, where he specialized in the packaged soap & detergent division. Throughout his career, Tom has demonstrated proficiency in regulatory affairs, management, marketing, strategic thinking, sales management, teamwork, and leadership.

With a remarkable track record, including leadership positions at Nucryst Pharmaceuticals, Songbird Hearing, Datamonitor, and Access Health, Tom Gardner continues to make significant contributions to the healthcare industry. He holds a B.A. in Economics and Mathematics from the University of St. Thomas (MN) and has shared his expertise as a guest lecturer at Northwestern University’s Kellogg Graduate School of Management.

settings.name: Vijitha Viv
settings.bio: Vijitha Viv is the founder and Chief Operations Officer at Biom Pharmaceutical. She is an..
settings.full_bio: Vijitha Viv is the founder and Chief Operations Officer at Biom Pharmaceutical. She is an operational expert with a solid background in Information Technology and e-commerce. She supervises the operations, administration, and accounting at Biom. She worked in leading IT companies and holds a Bachelor’s degree in both Computer Science and Electronics.

settings.name: Bobban Subhadra, M.S., Ph.D.
settings.bio: Dr. Subhadra leads Biom Pharmaceutical. As CEO of Biom, he brings expertise in growing and scaling businesses, operations, marketing, innovation, and broad brand portfolios…
settings.full_bio: Dr. Subhadra leads Biom Pharmaceutical. As CEO of Biom, he brings expertise in growing and scaling businesses, operations, marketing, innovation, and broad brand portfolios. He worked with several early-stage biotech companies to develop and commercialize biomedical products and services. As a researcher, he studied the role of neuroserpin, tissue plasminogen activator, and thyroid hormone in synaptic plasticity and developed Alzheimer’s disease mouse models, and has published extensively in prestigious journals including Nature and Science. He has developed and commercialized numerous patented technologies and products for biochemical, biofuel, and pharmaceutical companies. Bobban has earned a Master’s degree from the University of Arkansas and a Doctoral degree in Microbiology and Immunology from the School of Medicine, University of New Mexico.

settings.name: Eric Rueping
settings.bio: Eric is an operational expert adding long-term value through the supply chain and operational leadership and global strategic sourcing…
settings.full_bio: Eric is an operational expert adding long-term value through the supply chain and operational leadership and global strategic sourcing excellence spanning multiple industries. Key expertise in Building relationships and focusing on continuous improvement.
